svg.title: PixelPose SVG body parts
svg.desc: A set of SVG body part sprites for a 2D character animator, including head, torso, pelvis, upper and lower arms, upper and lower legs, hands, and feet.
svg.text: pivot points shown in cyan • copy SVG paths into your renderer
Each part is a self-contained SVG group. Pivot dots = joint attachment points.
Rotate each group around its proximal pivot to animate.
